name: Cain
oracleText:
Menace
Whenever another creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you create a Treasure token.
Whenever you sacrifice a Treasure, Cain deals 1 damage to any target.
flavorText: "And the Lord set a mark upon Cain, lest any finding him should kill him." — Genesis 4:15
notes: Early World major figure card based on the first three entries in the card list batch. Local reference image downloaded from the Wikimedia Commons reusable file page for Titian's Cain and Abel.
title: Marked Exile
